summary: Iteration 99 - Tested Module Guided Tours (5 modules), Auto-Archive Settings, Data Management page, Reset Tours button, and responsive design improvements. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Module tours work correctly on Sales, Stock, Employees, Analytics, and Settings pages with 4-step navigation (Next/Back/Skip buttons). Data Management page shows 7 collections with archive/export functionality. Auto-archive settings toggle and configuration UI work correctly. Reset Tours button found in Settings > Deploy tab.

minor.issue: 500 error on analytics page load - pre-existing issue, not related to current features

issues: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <tr>/<td>/<th> - cosmetic React dev warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Module tours (ModuleTour.jsx) correctly use localStorage keys like 'ssc_sales_tour_completed' for tracking completion
Each module tour has proper data-testid attributes (module-tour-card, module-tour-next, module-tour-skip, module-tour-prev, module-tour-close)
Auto-archive settings API correctly saves frequency, day, time, and per-collection settings
Reset Tours button properly clears all localStorage tour keys and reloads the page
Responsive design improvements verified: TransfersPage uses grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2, NotificationsPage uses text-2xl sm:text-4xl

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All module tours, data management, and responsive design verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 99 verified: 1) Module guided tours work on /sales (4 steps), /stock (4 steps), /employees (4 steps), /analytics (4 steps), /settings (3 steps) with Skip/Next/Back navigation and progress bar, 2) Tours use localStorage keys ssc_{module}_tour_completed for tracking, 3) Data Management page at /data-management shows 7 collections (sales=52, expenses=51, supplier_payments=1, invoices=10, activity_logs=544, scheduler_logs=18, notifications=89), 4) Auto-archive toggle reveals frequency/day/time settings and per-collection toggles, 5) Reset Tours button in Settings > Deploy tab clears all tour localStorage keys, 6) Responsive design: TransfersPage uses grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2, NotificationsPage uses text-2xl sm:text-4xl, PartnersPage uses hidden sm:table-cell for table columns

responsive_design.partners_page: hidden sm:table-cell for table columns - VERIFIED

known_limitations: Analytics page shows 'Failed to load analytics' error - pre-existing issue, not related to current iteration features
